top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China reports lowest GDP growth in more than 3 years
top_signals.summary: Second-quarter figure falls at low end of annual target range as monthly indicators have highlighted economic pressures
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Money Market Committee meeting – June 2026
top_signals.summary: The Money Markets Committee is a forum for market participants and authorities to discuss the UK unsecured deposits and funding market and securities lending and repo markets.

top_signals.title: Burnham team falls into infighting over Miliband chancellor pick
top_signals.summary: While many Andy Burnham supporters on the left of the governing Labour Party had expected him to put Energy Secretary Ed Miliband in charge of the Treasury, others are against it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

GABLER, FLANQ Complete Successful Sea Acceptance Test for USV
top_signals.summary: GABLER, a provider of submarine systems, and German defense technology company FLANQ have successfully completed the Sea Acceptance Test (SAT) demonstrating seaworthiness of their jointly developed Torpedo-Tube-Launched Uncrewed Surface Vessel…
